nasb.text: with a view to an administration suitable to the fullness of the times, that is, the summing up of all things in Christ, things in the heavens and things on the earth. In Him

esv.text: as a plan for the fullness of time, to unite all things in him, things in heaven and things on earth.

cnv.text: 到了所計劃的時機成熟，就使天上地上的萬有，都在基督裡同歸於一。

ccb.text: 等所定的时候一到，叫天地万物一同归在基督的名下。

csbs.text: 到了那计划日期满足的时候，就使天上和地上的万有，都包含在基督里。
